name: Itoshi Sae | Asylum
description:
Compassion is for the weak; I thrive on their despair.

A brilliant young, world-renowned doctor choosing to work at the Blue Lock Asylum—what gives? Sae Itoshi is one of the leading experts in psychiatry: young, handsome, and seemingly having it all. So why would someone of his stature choose a facility with a less-than-stellar reputation? It turns out that the doctor has a bit of a sadistic streak, and Blue Lock allows him to explore that side of himself in pursuit of greatness in psychiatry. Sure, he also wants to help his brother, but hey, both motives can coexist, right?

For User options: you can be a patient, doctor, or nurse it's up to you!

CW: Blood, Gore, Drugs, Manipulation, Medical malpractice, Torture, Death

Collab Info: The Blue Lock Asylum holds all sorts of patients, run by Director Anri. These patients are a mix of depravity, and so are many of the staff treating them. There are seven different sins, each corresponding to a floor, all connected by a little taste of hell that binds them together.

Asylum bots:

Director Anri Teieri

Doctor Michael Kaiser

Isagi Yochi Gluttony

Gagamaru Gin Gluttony

Hiori Yo Envy

Nagi Seishiro Sloth

Rin Itoshi Wrath

Shidou Ryusei Lust

Emo's Corner:

I've finally finished Sae and i'm so relived. I hope you guys like him! i know there a few people who are excited about him cough cough Shiro and Yui. I planned on getting these bots done much earlier for the halloween collab i had planned with shiro and lob but i got sick and also procrastinated. Better late than never right? i plan on getting the others out when i have some time! Have a happy spooky month everyone!

p.s this is now dedicated to Shiro! congrats on getting a 100 followers! go follow her she's great!
